sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: MKS Inc. price target raised to $230 from $200 at TD Cowen
feed.summary: TD Cowen has increased its price target for MKS Inc. (MKSI) to $230 from $200, maintaining a Buy rating on the shares. This adjustment comes as the company updated its 2025 outlook to the higher end of previous guidance, citing stronger-than-expected demand across all business divisions. The analyst also views MKS's potential to extend debt maturities and reduce interest payments favorably.

feed.title: Apogee Names Veteran Executive Mark Augdahl as CFO
feed.summary: Apogee Enterprises, Inc. has announced the appointment of Mark Augdahl as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, effective immediately. Augdahl, who previously served as interim CFO and has been with Apogee since 2000, brings nearly four decades of financial leadership experience. This promotion emphasizes continuity and seasoned financial stewardship as the company pursues its strategic goals and aims for long-term value creation.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks stock edges higher — what PANW traders are watching next
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) stock saw a modest increase amidst a broader market rally, with investors closely monitoring cybersecurity spending trends and upcoming earnings. The company's performance is seen as a barometer for enterprise security, especially considering potential budget tightening. Key factors for traders include the impact of interest rate expectations, significant acquisitions like Chronosphere, and guidance provided in previous financial reports.

feed.title: The Truth About Zimmer Biomet Stock: Silent Boom Or Boring Boomer Play?
feed.summary: The article explores whether Zimmer Biomet stock (ZBH) is a silently growing asset or a stable, perhaps unexciting, long-term investment. It highlights the company's position in the medical technology sector, particularly in joint replacements, benefiting from an aging global population and advancements in robot-assisted surgery. The author suggests ZBH is a solid choice for diversified, long-term portfolios despite lacking the viral hype of other trending stocks.

feed.title: Trimble Inc.: The Quiet Infrastructure OS Powering the Next Wave of Construction and Geospatial Tech
feed.summary: Trimble Inc. is transforming from a hardware provider to a cloud-first, full-stack platform for infrastructure and construction. The company's technology, including its Construction One platform and machine-control solutions, aims to bridge the gap between design and physical reality across construction, geospatial, agriculture, and transportation sectors. This shift towards recurring revenue through software and services, coupled with strong market tailwinds in infrastructure and climate initiatives, is re-rating Trimble's stock against industrial software peers.

feed.title: Associated Banc-Corp: Fourth Quarter Earnings Overview
feed.summary: Associated Banc-Corp reported strong fourth-quarter results, with a net profit of $137.1 million and earnings of 80 cents per share, significantly exceeding analyst expectations. The company also saw robust revenue generation and a nearly 7% increase in its stock price since the start of the year. This performance marks a turnaround from a loss in the same period last year.

feed.title: Build-A-Bear faces federal labor charge after firing worker day before union vote
feed.summary: Build-A-Bear is facing a federal labor charge from the United Food and Commercial Workers Local 655 after allegedly firing an assistant manager a day before a union representation vote. The union claims this action violates labor law. The employee, Lucy Acevedo, states she was fired for incorrectly using Bonus Club points to purchase a stuffed animal for her children.

feed.title: F5 (FFIV) CLASS ACTION ALERT: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C.
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. announces a class action lawsuit against F5, Inc. (FFIV) for disseminating allegedly false and misleading statements regarding the company's security capabilities. The lawsuit, filed in the US District Court for the Western District of Washington, covers investors who purchased F5 securities between October 28, 2024, and October 27, 2025. Investors are urged to contact the firm before the February 17, 2026 lead plaintiff deadline to discuss their legal rights following the significant stock price drop after F5 disclosed a major security breach affecting its highest revenue product, BIG-IP.

feed.title: General Dynamics (GD) Valuation Check After New US$988 Million U.S. Navy C5ISR Contract Win
feed.summary: General Dynamics recently secured a US$988 million contract from the U.S. Navy. The company's stock shows a P/E ratio of 23.4x, lower than its peers and the industry average, suggesting it might be undervalued based on typical metrics. However, a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model indicates the stock is currently overvalued at its US$365.83 share price.

feed.title: Should You Forget Altria? Why You Might Want to Buy This Unstoppable High-Yield Dividend Growth Stock Instead.
feed.summary: This article suggests that dividend investors should consider Clorox (NYSE: CLX) instead of Altria (NYSE: MO) for long-term opportunities. While Altria offers a high 6.9% yield, its core cigarette business is in long-term decline, posing significant risk. Clorox, despite recent headwinds, has a historically high 4.5% yield, strong market positions, and a proven history of innovation and dividend growth, making it a more stable and attractive investment.

feed.title: Constellation Energy (CEG) stock price slides toward $287 — what to watch before Friday’s open
feed.summary: Constellation Energy (CEG) shares fell 2.4% to $287.35, driven by political pressure on power bills and increased electricity demand from data centers. Wells Fargo lowered its price target but maintained an "Overweight" rating, citing multiple data center deals. The stock decline also comes amidst a looming deep freeze and potential PJM policy changes, raising concerns about future wholesale power prices and long-term contracts.

feed.title: Will Lower Q4 Pricing And A 33.8% Profit Drop Change Diamondback Energy's (FANG) Narrative
feed.summary: Diamondback Energy (FANG) is facing an expected 33.8% profit decline for Q4 2025 due to lower realized oil and natural gas prices, reflecting broader market weakness. While the company focuses on debt reduction and cash returns, this strategy makes its earnings more vulnerable to commodity price fluctuations. The market's muted reaction so far suggests this isn't seen as thesis-breaking, but upcoming earnings and guidance will be key determinants for investors.

feed.title: Argan stock hits all-time high of 399.7 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Argan Inc. (AGX) stock has reached an all-time high of $399.70, surpassing its previous 52-week high, driven by a 127.2% increase over the past year and strong investor confidence. Despite a high P/E ratio suggesting it's trading above its Fair Value, the company reported strong third-quarter earnings of $2.17 EPS, beating analyst expectations, and announced a 33% increase in its quarterly cash dividend to $0.50 per share. Goldman Sachs raised its price target to $399.00 while maintaining a Buy rating.

feed.title: T-Mobile Announces Redemption of 4.750% Senior Notes due February 1, 2028
feed.summary: T-Mobile USA, Inc., a wholly-owned subsidiary of T-Mobile US, Inc., announced its intention to redeem the full outstanding amounts of its 4.750% Senior Notes due 2028 (CUSIP No. 87264A AV7) and the 4.750% Senior Notes due 2028-1 held by Deutsche Telekom AG. The redemption will occur on February 1, 2026, at 100% of the principal amount plus accrued but unpaid interest. This redemption aims to manage T-Mobile's debt structure and is detailed for investors and noteholders.

feed.title: Local play details life and legacy of Columbia Sportswear founder Gert Boyle
feed.summary: A local play is highlighting the life and legacy of Gert Boyle, the iconic founder of Columbia Sportswear. This article provides a brief mention of the play, nestled among various local news updates including political events, crime reports, and community activities in the Portland area. The piece is part of a series of short video reports from KOIN 6 News.

feed.title: Urban Edge Expands and Extends Unsecured Credit Facilities
feed.summary: Urban Edge Properties (UE) has expanded and extended its unsecured credit facilities, totaling $950 million, which will increase its borrowing capacity by $150 million and significantly extend debt maturities. The package includes a resized $700 million unsecured revolving credit facility and $250 million of delayed-draw term loans, providing financial flexibility for growth initiatives. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates UE as Neutral, noting strong financial performance contrasted with bearish technical indicators and moderate valuation.

feed.title: Carpenter Technology (NYSE: CRS) declares quarterly dividend
feed.summary: Carpenter Technology (NYSE: CRS) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.20 per share. This dividend is payable on March 7, 2024, to shareholders of record as of January 26, 2024. The ex-dividend date is January 25, 2024.

feed.title: CRISPR Therapeutics (NASDAQ:CRSP) CEO Samarth Kulkarni Sells 30,000 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: CRISPR Therapeutics CEO Samarth Kulkarni sold 30,000 shares of the company's stock on January 20th at an average price of $51.75, totaling over $1.55 million. This transaction reduced his direct holdings to 194,201 shares, a 13.38% decrease. An additional sale of 60,000 shares occurred on January 22nd for over $3.6 million.

feed.title: United Rentals: A Strong Contender in the Equipment Rental Market
feed.summary: This article from The Motley Fool highlights United Rentals (NYSE: URI) as a strong contender in the equipment rental market. It encourages potential investors to explore their expert analysis on the company and market trends. The content also promotes The Motley Fool Stock Advisor service, showcasing past high-performing stock recommendations.

feed.title: Transportation Stocks Hit Records, Flashing a Classic Bullish Signal
feed.summary: Transportation stocks have recently reached record highs, which is traditionally seen as a bullish indicator for the overall stock market. The article highlights that various modes of transport, including planes, trains, automobiles, trucks, railroads, and boats, are contributing to this market uptrend. This phenomenon is likened to the classic movie "Planes, Trains and Automobiles," suggesting a broad-based strength in the sector.

feed.title: Arista Networks’ Duda sells shares worth $3.85 million
feed.summary: Kenneth Duda, President and CTO of Arista Networks Inc (NASDAQ:ANET), sold 29,990 shares of common stock for approximately $3.85 million on January 20, 2026, under a pre-arranged trading plan. He also exercised options to acquire 30,000 shares. The sales included shares for the benefit of Duda's children and a trust, highlighting the company's strong financial health and upcoming earnings report on February 12.

feed.title: Columbus McKinnon prices $900 million senior secured notes offering
feed.summary: Columbus McKinnon Corporation has priced a $900 million offering of 7.125% senior secured notes due 2033, reduced from an initial plan of $1.225 billion. The proceeds from this offering, combined with other funding, will finance the acquisition of Kito Crosby Limited and refinance existing debt. The notes will become secured by the company's assets upon the acquisition's closing, which is expected by January 30, 2026.

feed.title: KLA (KLAC) stock price slips as New Street lifts target — what to watch before earnings
feed.summary: KLA (KLAC) shares slipped despite a price target increase from New Street, with Deutsche Bank also raising its target but maintaining a Hold rating. Investors are now focused on KLA's upcoming January 29 earnings call for guidance on chip-fabrication spending and tool demand, which is seen as a key indicator for the semiconductor industry. The article highlights potential downside risk if the company's outlook on demand is weaker than expected, given elevated expectations among analysts.

feed.title: Banc of California Inc (BANC) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Loan Growth and ...
feed.summary: Banc of California Inc (BANC) reported strong results for Q4 2025, with an 11% sequential increase in EPS to $0.42 and significant loan production growth. The company saw margin expansion and returned capital to shareholders through share repurchases, despite a modest dip in net interest income and an increase in classified loan balances. Management provided guidance for 2026, anticipating mid-single-digit loan growth and increased expenses due to investments in technology and talent.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Consumer Cyclical Companies: TJX Companies (TJX) and Portillo’s (PTLO)
feed.summary: This article provides analyst insights on two consumer cyclical companies: TJX Companies (TJX) and Portillo’s (PTLO). Bernstein maintained a Buy rating on TJX with a $170.00 price target, while Deutsche Bank initiated coverage with a Buy rating and an even higher target. Stifel Nicolaus maintained a Hold rating on Portillo’s, though UBS also kept a Hold rating with a slightly lower price target.

feed.title: Columbus McKinnon trims note sale to $900M to fund Kito Crosby buy
feed.summary: Columbus McKinnon (CMCO) announced the pricing of $900.0 million of 7.125% senior secured notes due 2033 to finance its pending acquisition of Kito Crosby. The offering size was downsized from an initial $1,225.0 million. The notes are initially unsecured but will become secured and guaranteed by U.S. subsidiaries after the acquisition closes, with a special redemption clause if the acquisition does not finalize by August 10, 2026.

feed.title: Columbus McKinnon Announces Pricing of Senior Secured Notes
feed.summary: Columbus McKinnon Corporation has priced an offering of $900.0 million in 7.125% senior secured notes due 2033 to finance its acquisition of Kito Crosby Limited. The offering size was reduced from $1,225.0 million and is expected to close on January 30, 2026. Proceeds will also refinance existing debt and cover related expenses, though the offering is not conditional on the acquisition's consummation.

feed.title: Amylyx Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:AMLX) Trading Down 4.5% - What's Next?
feed.summary: Amylyx Pharmaceuticals' stock (NASDAQ:AMLX) dropped 4.5% to $16.1650 during Thursday trading, with trading volume significantly below average. Analyst sentiment is mixed but leans towards a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $17.25, despite recent insider selling by the CFO and CEO. The biopharmaceutical company, which has a market cap of $1.78 billion, is primarily focused on developing treatments for neurodegenerative diseases.

feed.title: Western Digital lays off 87 workers at its massive San Jose campus
feed.summary: Western Digital has laid off 87 employees at its San Jose campus, with the layoffs becoming effective on January 20. This marks another significant round of job cuts for the company, following a large layoff in Silicon Valley in 2024. The article briefly notes the increasing frequency of serial layoffs across Silicon Valley companies.

feed.title: Did Concerns Over Earnings Quality and Dilution Just Shift Take-Two Interactive Software's (TTWO) Investment Narrative?
feed.summary: Recent commentary on Take-Two Interactive Software (TTWO) highlights concerns about slowing sales growth, cash outflows, and share dilution, despite increasing revenue. This has led analysts to question the company's ability to convert growth into sustained shareholder value. For investors, the focus has shifted from headline revenue beats to earnings quality and cash generation as key short-term catalysts.

feed.title: United Rentals: A Strong Contender in the Equipment Rental Market
feed.summary: This article highlights United Rentals (NYSE: URI) as a strong contender in the equipment rental market, offering insights from Motley Fool's expert analysts. While not among their top 10 immediate stock picks, the analysis encourages potential investors to explore market trends and investment opportunities related to the company. The Motley Fool's Stock Advisor has a strong track record of identifying high-growth stocks.

feed.title: Principal Financial Group (PFG) Reports $781 Billion in Assets Under Management
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group (PFG) reported $781.0 billion in Assets Under Management (AUM) as of December 31, 2025. This figure includes contributions from disposed operations, and a 1.5% positive impact on AUM due to foreign currency translation and market performance. The company highlights its exposure to small, mid-cap, and international equities, as well as high yield and preferred fixed income securities.

feed.title: American Eagle Outfitters exec chairman sells $26.8M in AEO stock
feed.summary: Jay L. Schottenstein, Executive Chairman of American Eagle Outfitters Inc., sold approximately $26.8 million worth of AEO stock between January 20 and January 22, 2026, through three separate transactions. Following these sales, Mr. Schottenstein still holds a significant number of shares both directly and indirectly through family trusts and LLCs. The company recently revised its fourth-quarter operating income outlook upwards due to strong holiday sales and announced a five-year global ambassador partnership with Lamine Yamal.

feed.title: Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) Shares Down 1.7% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Merck & Co., Inc. (MRK) shares dropped 1.7% during mid-day trading on Thursday, with trading volume significantly below its daily average. This comes after the company reported quarterly EPS that missed consensus estimates, although it did increase its quarterly dividend. Analyst ratings for MRK are mixed, with a consensus "Hold" but some major firms raising price targets and maintaining "Buy" ratings.

feed.title: TikTok Seals Deal to Create US Venture With Oracle, Silver Lake
feed.summary: TikTok and its Chinese parent ByteDance Ltd. have officially created a US venture involving Oracle Corp., Silver Lake Management LLC, and MGX. This deal aims to transfer parts of TikTok’s US business to non-Chinese owners, securing the app's future in the United States and avoiding a nationwide ban. The agreement was first announced by the Trump Administration in September.

feed.title: Amprius Technologies (NYSE:AMPX) Shares Up 5.9% - Should You Buy?
feed.summary: Amprius Technologies (NYSE:AMPX) saw its shares climb 5.9% on Thursday, with trading volume significantly above average. Analysts have a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $16.00, despite the company remaining unprofitable and recent insider share sales totaling nearly $29.7 million. The company, which specializes in high-energy-density lithium-ion batteries, recently beat quarterly earnings and revenue estimates.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: East West Bancorp Q4 2025 beats EPS forecasts
feed.summary: East West Bancorp (EWBC) reported strong Q4 2025 earnings, surpassing EPS forecasts with $2.55 against an expected $2.49. The company also announced a 33% increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.80 per share and projected 5-7% loan and net interest income growth for 2026, alongside double-digit fee income growth. Executives highlighted record-breaking financial metrics for 2025 and a disciplined approach to capital management and client-focused growth despite economic uncertainties.

feed.title: Alaska Air Group (ALK) Reports Q4 Revenue of $3.63 Billion, Meeting Expectations
feed.summary: Alaska Air Group (ALK) reported fourth-quarter revenue of $3.63 billion, meeting expectations despite a temporary demand pullback. The company saw growth in corporate travel, premium revenue, cargo revenue, and loyalty revenue, reflecting effective commercial strategies. Alaska Air anticipates 2026 earnings per share between $3.50 and $6.50, contingent on macroeconomic recovery and stable fuel prices.

feed.title: Voyager Reports Third Quarter 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Voyager Technologies, Inc. announced its Q3 2025 financial results, reporting net sales of $39.6 million, including 31% growth in its Defense and National Security segment. The company also announced a net loss of $(16.3) million, a total backlog of $188.6 million, and expects FY 2025 revenue to be at the high end of its $165 million to $170 million guidance range. Key strategic initiatives include acquisitions, investments in next-generation technologies, and continued progress on the Starlab program.

feed.title: Wsfs Financial stock hits 52-week high at 59.7 USD
feed.summary: WSFS Financial Corporation's stock reached a new 52-week high of $59.7, currently trading slightly higher at $59.93. The company has demonstrated robust performance with an 11.64% increase over the past year, consistent dividend payments for 28 years, and a "GOOD" financial health rating according to InvestingPro. Recent corporate activities include strong Q3 2025 earnings, a $200 million public offering of senior unsecured notes, and a new board appointment.

feed.title: Keypoint Intelligence Names Xerox 2026 Smart Workplace Solutions Line of the Year
feed.summary: Xerox Holdings Corporation has been honored by Keypoint Intelligence, receiving the Smart Workplace Solutions Line of the Year for the eighth consecutive time and a Pick Award for Xerox® Workplace Cloud. These accolades recognize Xerox's comprehensive portfolio of solutions for modern workplace needs, including workflow automation, intelligent document processing, secure cloud services, and its best-in-class capabilities in secure, cloud-based print and fleet management. The recognition also highlights the value of the newly combined portfolio of Xerox and Lexmark, and Xerox's commitment to AI-driven and integrated solutions for hybrid work environments.

feed.title: Airgain (AIRG) CEO Suen sells $63,908 in shares By Investing.com
feed.summary: Airgain (NASDAQ:AIRG) CEO Jacob Suen sold 15,993 shares of common stock for a total of $63,908 to cover tax obligations related to Restricted Stock Units. Following the sale, Suen directly owns 293,635 shares. The company recently reported mixed Q3 2025 financial results but is expanding its market presence through a new commercial partnership and has received a reiterated Buy rating from Lake Street Capital Markets.

feed.title: agilon health Sets Date to Report Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: agilon health, inc. announced that it will release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2025 after market close on Wednesday, February 25, 2026. The company will also host a conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET to discuss these results, accessible via phone or webcast. agilon health is a trusted partner empowering physicians to transform healthcare to a value-based Total Care Model for senior patients.

feed.title: agilon health, inc. Class Action: Levi & Korsinsky Reminds
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP reminds investors of agilon health, inc. (NYSE: AGL) about a pending class action lawsuit with a lead plaintiff deadline of March 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that the company made false statements and concealed material information regarding its 2025 guidance and the impact of strategic actions, leading to investor losses. Investors who suffered losses between February 26, 2025, and August 4, 2025, can seek to be appointed lead plaintiff without incurring out-of-pocket costs.

feed.title: Dominion Energy prepares for possible widespread power outages amid winter storm
feed.summary: Dominion Energy is mobilizing hundreds of crews and support personnel in anticipation of widespread power outages caused by a winter storm bringing heavy snow and ice to the Commonwealth. Officials emphasize that ice accumulation is the biggest concern, as even small amounts can damage trees and power lines and hinder restoration efforts. Customers are encouraged to report outages and storm damage to help crews identify problem areas quickly.

feed.title: TRNR Provides Shareholder Update on Sportstech Process & Operating Strategy
feed.summary: Interactive Strength Inc. (TRNR) has issued a shareholder letter to update investors on the Sportstech loan and acquisition process. The company also provided additional details regarding its improved operating scale and near-term plans. TRNR, known for its Wattbike, CLMBR, and FORME brands, will offer further email updates to shareholders who sign up on its website.

feed.title: The Truth About Bilibili Inc: Is This Viral Anime Stock a Hidden Cheat Code or Just Copium?
feed.summary: This article examines Bilibili Inc. (BILI), a popular Chinese platform for anime and gaming culture, to determine if its stock is a worthwhile investment. While the platform boasts strong community engagement and a loyal Gen Z user base in China, the stock is categorized as a high-risk, speculative bet due to its volatility, past price crashes, and the ongoing challenge of consistently converting engagement into profit. Investors are advised to exercise caution and recognize that hype does not equate to a guaranteed strategy.

feed.title: ASML (NASDAQ:ASML) Stock Price Up 2.6% - Here's Why
feed.summary: ASML's stock price increased by 2.6% to around $1,395, supported by reiterated "buy" ratings from JPMorgan and UBS, and a "Moderate Buy" consensus from MarketBeat with a $1,407 price target. The company benefits from its dominant position in EUV lithography and its high-NA EUV roadmap, ensuring long-term demand and pricing power. However, views are mixed as Grupo Santander downgraded ASML to "underperform," and upcoming quarterly earnings could either further boost the stock or lead to profit-taking.

feed.title: Revvity trades higher on earnings guidance above consensus
feed.summary: The article states that Revvity's stock is trading higher due to its earnings guidance surpassing consensus expectations. No specific details about the earnings or guidance are provided in the snippet.

feed.title: Will Hilton Worldwide (HLT) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
feed.summary: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (HLT) is poised to potentially beat earnings estimates in its upcoming quarterly report, consistent with a strong track record of surpassing expectations in prior quarters. The company's positive Zacks Earnings ESP of +2.97% combined with a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) indicates a high probability of another earnings beat. Its next earnings report is anticipated on February 11, 2026.
